decisions.label: Is number of countries equal to quantity

decisions.label: Is number of conversation equal to quantity

decisions.description: Check if the quote rate plan charge is original to see if we update the quantity in the upddated quantity
decisions.name: Is_original_quote
decisions.label: Is original quote?

decisions.name: Managed_services_New_product_or_Original
decisions.label: Managed services New product or Original

decisions.name: New_product_or_original_Data_feed
decisions.label: New product or original Data feed

decisions.name: number_of_Datasets_equal_to_quantity
decisions.label: number of Datasets equal to quantity

decisions.name: number_of_Managed_services_equal_to_quantity

decisions.description: Check if the country name is longer then 255 and split it
decisions.name: Update_Country_name_for_Contract
decisions.label: Update Country name for Contract

formulas.name: Change_iso_code_to_name_firstcharge_var
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "CRI"), "Costa Rica, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "DOM"), "Dominican Republic, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "ECU"), "Ecuador, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "SLV"), "El Salvador, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "GTM"), "Guatemala, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "HND"), "Honduras, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "NIC"), "Nicaragua, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "PAN"), "Panamá, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "PRI"), "Puerto Rico, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "LUX"), "Luxembourg, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "PRY"), "Paraguay, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Country_Filter__c}, "PRI"), "Uruguay, ", null)

formulas.name: Convert_Aggregated_Geography_API_to_label
formulas.expression: TRIM( IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedEMEA"), "Aggregated EMEA, ", "") & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedMENA"), "Aggregated MENA, ", "") & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedEurope"), "Aggregated Europe, ", "") & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedNA"), "Aggregated NA (North America), ", "") & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedAPAC"), "Aggregated APAC, ", "") & IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedLATAM"), "Aggregated LATAM, ", "") )

formulas.name: Convert_API_name_to_Label
formulas.expression: IF(CONTAINS( {!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Multi_Attribution_to_Text__c}, "DaaSAccessWebsitesBM"), "Websites, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS( {!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Multi_Attribution_to_Text__c}, "DaaSAccessEcommerceBM"), "Ecommerce, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS( {!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Multi_Attribution_to_Text__c}, "DaaSAccessAdvertisingBM"), "Advertising, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS( {!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Multi_Attribution_to_Text__c}, "StockIntelligenceMappingBM"), "Ticker Mapping, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS( {!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Multi_Attribution_to_Text__c}, "DaaSAccessCompaniesBM"), "Companies, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS( {!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Multi_Attribution_to_Text__c}, "DaaSAccessAppsPremiumBM"), "Apps Premium, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS( {!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Multi_Attribution_to_Text__c}, "DaaSAccessAppsBM"), "Apps, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS( {!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Multi_Attribution_to_Text__c}, "DaaSAccessSearchBM"), "Search, ", null)

formulas.name: convert_converstion_values
formulas.expression: SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!conversion_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Multi_Attribution_to_Text__c}, "Consumer Electronic Accessories", "Electronic Accessories"), "Consumer Electronics Brands", "Electronics Brands"), "Consumer Electronics Retailers", "Electronics Retailers"), "Athletic Apparel Brands", "Athletic Brands"), "Athletic Apparel Retailers", "Athletic Retailers"), "Meal Kits and Restaurants and Food Delivery", "Food"), "Home Ware and Improvement", "Home"), "Gambling and Lottery", "Lottery"), "Jewelry Retailers", "Jewelry"), "Video Games Consoles and Accessories", "Video Games"), "Vitamins and Supplements", "Vitamins")

formulas.name: Convert_Country_iso_to_name
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "CRI"), "Costa Rica, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "DOM"), "Dominican Republic, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "ECU"), "Ecuador, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "SLV"), "El Salvador, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "GTM"), "Guatemala, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "HND"), "Honduras, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "NIC"), "Nicaragua, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "PAN"), "Panamá, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "PRI"), "Puerto Rico, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "LUX"), "Luxembourg, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "PRY"), "Paraguay, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Final_Quote_rate_charge.Country_Filter__c}, "PRI"), "Uruguay, ", null)

formulas.name: convert_datasets_API_to_label
formulas.expression: IF(CONTAINS({!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Updated_products__c}, "DaaSAccessWebsitesBM"), "Websites, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS({!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Updated_products__c}, "DaaSAccessTechnologiesBM"), "Technologies, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS({!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Updated_products__c}, "DaaSAccessEcommerceBM"), "Ecommerce, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS({!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Updated_products__c}, "DaaSAccessAdvertisingBM"), "Advertising, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS({!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Updated_products__c}, "StockIntelligenceMappingBM"), "Ticker Mapping, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS({!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Updated_products__c}, "DaaSAccessCompaniesBM"), "Companies, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS({!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Updated_products__c}, "DaaSAccessAppsPremiumBM"), "Apps Premium, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS({!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Updated_products__c}, "DaaSAccessAppsBM"), "Apps, ", null)& IF(CONTAINS({!datasets_Final_Quote_rate_charge.Updated_products__c}, "DaaSAccessSearchBM"), "Search, ", null)

formulas.name: Convert_iso_totext
Dataset_labal
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES( {!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c} , "DaaSAccessWebsitesBM"), "Websites, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES( {!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c} , "DaaSAccessTechnologiesBM"), "Technologies, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessEcommerceBM"), "Ecommerce, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessAdvertisingBM"), "Advertising, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "StockIntelligenceMappingBM"), "Ticker Mapping, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessCompaniesBM"), "Companies, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessAppsPremiumBM"), "Apps Premium, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessAppsBM"), "Apps, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessSearchBM"), "Search, ", null)

formulas.name: datasetstotext
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "Websites"), "DaaSAccessWebsitesBM, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "Ecommerce"), "DaaSAccessEcommerceBM, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "Advertising"), "DaaSAccessAdvertisingBM, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "Ticker Mapping"), "StockIntelligenceMappingBM, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "Companies"), "DaaSAccessCompaniesBM, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "Apps Premium"), "DaaSAccessAppsPremiumBM, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "Apps"), "DaaSAccessAppsBM, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!First_Quote_Rate_Plan_Charge.Datasets_contract__c}, "Search"), "DaaSAccessSearchBM, ", null)

formulas.name: New_value_country
formulas.expression:
IF ( ISblank ({!Convert_Country_iso_to_name}) , "", IF( ISblank ({!ShowCountryfilter}) , LEFT({!Convert_Country_iso_to_name}, LEN({!Convert_Country_iso_to_name})-2),
", " & LEFT({!Convert_Country_iso_to_name}, LEN({!Convert_Country_iso_to_name})-2)))

fields.name: AdvisoryServices_Success_Message
fields.fieldText: Advisory Services were updated successfully

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Errormessage
fields.fieldText: Oops! There seems to be a temporary glitch, please try again. If this error occurs again, please contact salesops@similarweb.com

fields.fieldText: The quantity must be the same as the number of Aggregated Geography filters selected
